product_overview: STTYLUS is a web application for barbershops that lets clients quickly create appointments with available professionals, select services, dates, and times, and confirm bookings. It also provides professionals with a dedicated dashboard to manage availability, monitor the day’s schedule, and configure their work schedule.
core_goals: Allow clients to create a barber appointment in a few simple steps.
Let professionals manage their availability and work schedule.
Help clients avoid scheduling conflicts by showing unavailable times.
Notify professionals when a new appointment is created.
Separate client and professional experiences based on user profile.

features.name: User Login and Registration
features.description: Users can sign in with email and password or create a new account as either a client or a professional based on the invitation code.
user_flows: Navigate to /login -> Choose to create a new account -> Fill in full name, phone, email, and password -> Enter the professional invitation code when creating a barber account -> Submit the form -> See the correct area for the new profile type
Navigate to /login -> Choose to sign in -> Fill in email and password -> Submit the form -> See the client home or professional dashboard based on the profile
Navigate to /login -> Choose to sign in -> Fill in invalid credentials -> Submit the form -> See a friendly login error message

features.name: Appointment Booking
features.description: Clients can select a barber, a service, a date, and an available time slot to confirm an appointment.
user_flows: Navigate to /client-home/agendar -> Select an available barber -> Select a service -> Select a date from the upcoming days -> Select an available time slot -> Confirm the appointment -> See a success confirmation

Navigate to /client-home -> Select a service from the home page -> Continue into the appointment flow with the service already selected -> Select an available barber -> Select a date and time -> Confirm the appointment -> See a success confirmation
Navigate to /client-home/agendar -> Select a barber -> Select a service -> Choose a time that is already occupied -> See the unavailable time slot blocked from selection

features.name: Professional Work Schedule Configuration
features.description: Professionals can update their work start time, end time, and working days from their profile settings.
user_flows: Navigate to /professional-dashboard/perfil -> Update the work start time -> Update the work end time -> Select the working days -> Save the schedule -> See the updated work schedule reflected in the profile
Navigate to /professional-dashboard/perfil -> Change the work start time and working days -> Save the changes -> See the updated schedule stored for the professional profile

routes.description: Client home page showing barbers and services
Dashboard for professionals showing schedule and earnings
Professional profile settings including dynamic work schedule

features.name: User Login and Registration
features.description: Login with email/password or create new account

features.name: Appointment Booking

user_interactions: Select Date and Time from dynamic generated slots

features.name: Professional Work Schedule Configuration
